'Moss rose' most often means Portulaca grandiflora (the annual succulent) for a home gardener, but is also the botanical class of Duchesse de Verneuil (which has '(Moss Rose)' in its name). Portulaca entries have no 'moss rose' text so they MISS today; the query currently resolves only to the Duchesse rose - the wrong plant for most shoppers.
